'' While adding racks and their types to AWP, I noticed that regardless of the type, it is possible to send such a rack outside the company. Currently, we want to add internal racks/carts – is it possible to block the shipment of racks of a specific type?
Not sure we can block a shipment of internal racks used in production and not in delivery
But logically a user cannot be wrong when he scans a rack into dispatch (only this rack at this registration point is back up to AWB)

 • Is it possible to block the shipment of racks of a specific type?
No LO is using the rack allocation from AWB, AWB is using the rack allocation from AWP, AWP allocate the rack on dispatch reg…

FW: [AW-227181] Fakro patch - ToolTV Benteler (6)
Feedback from Zainab:
 
Record_00.test is modified and will work fine now.
I am using User C. Davis in the test file because initially it was ---- 
you can change user if you like.
 

 
Record_00 is clicking Produce button.  There is a Attribute Repeat = "50" which means repeat this clicking of button 50 times. Before it could have a maximum value of 50. Now, it could have a maximum value of 100, I looked into the code. May be you can reduce some lines written in in this Record_00.test file if you like.
 
I guess, If you preset the User in Production Terminal configuration so there will be no need to specify the user in test file.
  
Z poważaniem | Best regards
 
Patrik Pytlak
Senior Consultant Professional Services
A+W Clarity

### 17/02/2025 - TODD REVIEW ASSISTANCE TO POLAND > PEER REVIEW NEEDED (INTERNAL) ###
Using the Customer DXF File I can get the Spacer cutting size using SPacer List from the Release Dialog as shown below.
$$$ MY REVIEW $$$
Printing a IG Production List does not show spacer information

Customer will need to Print the Spacer List from the Release Dialog

As for the Spacer Production File - the customer will need to ensure they have the Bender Setup in AWP under Master Data > Machinery - Spacer Bender.
They will also need to ensure they have the Bender and IG Line selected plus the Initialization options for Bender Texts, Sketches and Spacer Sketches as needed.
```

### [AW-217971] — Bed loads quantity before furnace

| Field | Value |

| **Category** | Support Clarity / Support Sweden |

**Description:**

> RE: [AW-217971] Bed loads quantity before furnace (18) Hello Erik, As I have explained in my previous email, issue is most likely not related with Hegla. Operator can think that sheets not moving from Helga conveyor and the problem is on their side, but the thing is that Hegla gets no request/release to move second load to loading table of the furnace. It needs to be clarified where is this communication gap. We can make a new test together, by setting queue to 2. Most likely this test can be pl...

<details>
<summary>View Full Conversation Thread</summary>

```
From: Linas Liaudinskas (linas.liaudinskas@pressglass.com)
To: support.se@a-w.com | Date: 24.07.2025 08:41
Type: Request | 
RE: [AW-217971] Bed loads quantity before furnace (18)
Hello Erik,

As I have explained in my previous email, issue is most likely not related with Hegla. Operator can think that sheets not moving from Helga conveyor and the problem is on their side, but the thing is that Hegla gets no request/release to move second load to loading table of the furnace. It needs to be clarified where is this communication gap.
We can make a new test together, by setting queue to 2. Most likely this test can be planned end of August, but I will let you know.

In a mean time, could you please check my 2nd point, regarding optimization view on Furnace control pattern viewer? Both optimizations appear at the same time on PV and second one overrides the first one, which is misleading for the operator. There is a risk to temper the glass under wrong recipe.

Linas Liaudinskas • Process Engineer

**Description:**

> RE: [AW-237337] GB remakes (3) Hello Ernestas, The breakage of a IG unit, will also break the georgian bars - as long as you booked the production of the unit and sub parts. If a breakage occur before IG unit is produced, you will need to break the georgian bars part (unique barcode) separately. I checked your sample. It looks like the georgian bars was not allocated to built in (reg. point 16) during IG production. Did you follow the normal flow of production for your tests, or did you skip som...

<details>
<summary>View Full Conversation Thread</summary>

```
From: Adam Grimberg (support.se@a-w.com)
To: ernestas.blozys@pressglass.com | Date: 22.07.2025 17:20
Type: Answer | 
RE: [AW-237337] GB remakes (3)
Hello Ernestas, 
The breakage of a IG unit, will also break the georgian bars - as long as you booked the production of the unit and sub parts. 
If a breakage occur before IG unit is produced, you will need to break the georgian bars part (unique barcode) separately. 
I checked your sample. It looks like the georgian bars was not allocated to built in (reg. point 16) during IG production. Did you follow the normal flow of production for your tests, or did you skip some booking?
Best regards
Adam Grimberg

> [AW-236947] Laminated glasses batch (3) Good Morning Regimantas, I hope you had a good weekend. In this instance I hope we can answer this request by asking the following question - How can glass be marked as assembled (laminated) until the glass has been at least cut to make it available. As the release of the batch and the cutting of the glass changes the status of the order so that the business can trace the production status of the order and items and makes the glass available for other proc...

<summary>View Full Conversation Thread</summary>

```
From: Todd Leiseman (support.se@a-w.com)
To: it2@stronglasas.lt | Date: 21.07.2025 01:50
Type: Answer | 
[AW-236947] Laminated glasses batch (3)
Good Morning Regimantas,
I hope you had a good weekend.
In this instance I hope we can answer this request by asking the following question - How can glass be marked as assembled (laminated) until the glass has been at least cut to make it available.
As the release of the batch and the cutting of the glass changes the status of the order so that the business can trace the production status of the order and items and makes the glass available for other processing's to be completed.
Question - What is the reason from Stronglasas of trying to assemble a laminated glass unit outside of it being released or cut?
 
Best regards,
Todd Leiseman

> [AW-236766] ARCPROBLEM [URGENT] (3) Good Morning Regimantas, I hope you are looking forward to the weekend. With the archiving problems where it is showing a batch number between 1000 - 9999, it could be because that the batch number has not had all it's open processing items marked off as completed. <details>
<summary>View Full Conversation Thread</summary>

```
From: Todd Leiseman (support.se@a-w.com)
To: regimantas@glasslt.com | Date: 18.07.2025 08:06
Type: Answer | 
[AW-236766] ARCPROBLEM [URGENT] (3)
Good Morning Regimantas,
I hope you are looking forward to the weekend.
With the archiving problems where it is showing a batch number between 1000 - 9999, it could be because that the batch number has not had all it's open processing items marked off as completed.
Typically for archiving to be completed - all processing on the batch need to be completed, which can be completed using the batch number under a A+W Production Terminal > Order.
Enter the batch number and ensure that all processings for the batch have been marked off at the matching Registration Points, this should change the batch status to Produced and then the operator can manually change the batch status to Archive Batch.
After this is completed the Archiving status should action the item again for archiving.
Any further batching issue after this will require a more detailed investigation.
 
Best regards,
Todd Leiseman
###EOM##

A+W Support Sweden +46 (0) 35 175 417
A+W Support UK + 44 (0) 560348 8606
A+…
```

</details>

**Description:**

> [AW-236728] Item unlocking (3) Good Morning Regimantas, I hope your having a good work week. The function - Change Locked Item / Shift + F12 is per order item only. The best option if the issue is to change many items at the same time is to change the status of the order down to a lower number Example = 20 - Document Changed. This unlocks the order items and allows all them to be changed as needed without unlocking. However, this will depend on the Status of the order and where it currently is i...

<details>
<summary>View Full Conversation Thread</summary>

```
From: Todd Leiseman (support.se@a-w.com)
To: regimantas@glasslt.com | Date: 16.07.2025 06:50
Type: Answer | 
[AW-236728] Item unlocking (3)
Good Morning Regimantas,
I hope your having a good work week.
The function - Change Locked Item / Shift + F12 is per order item only.
The best option if the issue is to change many items at the same time is to change the status of the order down to a lower number 
Example = 20 - Document Changed.
This unlocks the order items and allows all them to be changed as needed without unlocking.
However, this will depend on the Status of the order and where it currently is in the production process.
If the order item is already in production It maybe a better option to return the order to the Pool in Production and then send an order Cancellation via the Transfer To Production in A+W Business, if it has not already had production started.
Change the order status back (Example - 20 - Document Changed) that was cancelled, make the order changes needed and then transfer the order again to A+W Production (after order status changed to 390 - Ready for transfer to AWP).
Note - GlassLT A+W B…
```

</details>

<summary>View Full Conversation Thread</summary>

```
From: Jens Thorsen
To: | Date: 08.07.2025 16:50
Type: State changed | 
Rejecting of Purchased glass item (3)
Maybe check this:
To reject purchased glass specifically in A+W Production, follow these steps:
 • Access the Purchased Glass Section: Navigate to the section of A+W Production that deals with purchased glass. This may be under a specific menu related to inventory or materials.

 • Locate the Glass Item: Find the specific purchased glass item you want to reject. You may need to search by order number, item number, or other identifiers.

 • Initiate the Reject Process:
 • Look for an option to "Reject" or "Return" the item. This could be a button or a menu option.
 • If prompted, enter the reason for rejection. This could include defects, incorrect specifications, or other issues.

 • Update Status: Ensure that the status of the purchased glass is updated to reflect that it has been rejected. This may involve changing the status in the system or marking it in a specific way.

 • Save Changes: After entering all necessary information and updating the status, make sure…
```

</details>

Units without rack number (2)
Hello,

I need you guidence on understanding where could be the problem.

For two weeks now we see way more glass units without assigned rack number.

It might be because of operators behaviour on shopfloar, but in most cases I do not believe in that, since this issue is hapenning to all stations an began on the same time to most of our workers.

Order number: 257366
Unit label number: 002356557

 where etikettnr = '002356557'
           and auftnr = '257366'
           and lastmodzeit = '2025-06-26 15:00:59.547'

How user could make glass unit to loose assigned rack without booking „start“ status to a assigned rack ?

I have checked booking errors window, there is no errors on this given case?

What do you think where could be a problem and how it could be solved?

**Description:**

> RE: Regarding the manual decoating [AW-233935] (7) Hello Linas, The problem is that the Manual Decoating is still included in the calculation of the total edge decoating. The cutting driver will use the value in pool_entschichtung for decoating.  This is controlled via the product class in AWB master data. I think you have a few alternatives here. Two standard options, and one custom. It is possible for you to change the product class to 420 - Decoating. This will let you add it on the tempered ...

<details>
<summary>View Full Conversation Thread</summary>

```
From: Adam Grimberg (support.se@a-w.com)
To: support@stronglasas.lt, adam.grimberg@a-w.com | Date: 30.06.2025 16:11
Type: Answer | 
RE: Regarding the manual decoating [AW-233935] (7)
Hello Linas, 
The problem is that the Manual Decoating is still included in the calculation of the total edge decoating. The cutting driver will use the value in pool_entschichtung for decoating.  This is controlled via the product class in AWB master data. 
I think you have a few alternatives here. Two standard options, and one custom.  
It is possible for you to change the product class to 420 - Decoating. This will let you add it on the tempered glass and would not transfer to the cutting code. But, it means that the input parameters for sales would be different, see picture 1 below. 
The second option is to disable BOM Breakdown on the tempered Master data (BOM tab) article, for edge stripping product class. See second picture below.  Then you put the automatic decoating on the cut glass, and manual decoating on tempered glass in the BOM. Your order entry persons will need to take care where in the BOM, each decoating is entered. 
Third option is that I investigate if I can c…
```

</details>

Hur rack ordrar skapas för att fakturera rack
 
Pallvärde behövs fyllas i där artikelnummret skrivs in för att koppla
Packat och lev kommer tillbaka som feedback till Business
 
Kunddata klassifikatorer PallFakt eft X dagar 0 så stängs den av
Finns på alla kunder för att aktivera
Flöde körs varje natt som kan följas i Monitorn under customizings
Boxen Bortappad blir ibockad på Pallar
Produktion och palltyper eller pallar
Om något är fel så kan man bock aur denna så tar flödet om körningen
Filen hamnar under Export EDI
Importera EDI filer via Importera
Dokument order och sedan Importera
Detta fel kommer om inte artikel är inlagd på pallvärde

 
Sedan behöver man skicka en pall faktura precis som vanligt när man skapar en order faktura
Spara och sedan spara igen
 
De vill ha ordernummer kopplat toll pallordern

Däremot så tror jag att vi kan ändra hur den arkiverar tickets genom att kolla först kolla om det finns kvar i OSBSOA.dbo.Stock_StockSheets. To: support.se@a-w.com | Date: 17.06.2025 09:58

Sv: [AW-233871] Arkiverade tickets, batch 8807 (5)
Hej Henrik,

Det stämmer att packningen antagligen har lagt in fel glas på en pall via deras Tool TV, misstag händer då och då och är inget jag tror vi kommer kunna eliminera. Däremot så tror jag att vi kan ändra hur den arkiverar tickets genom att kolla först kolla om det finns kvar i OSBSOA.dbo.Stock_StockSheets.
Gör den det så ska den inte arkiveras förrän den har försvunnit från denna tabellen.

Jag har inte koll på hur denna arkivering görs, är den triggad på tidpunkter där den kollar vad som är packat eller är det när processen packning är görs?

Vi kan vänta på att Anders eller Adam är tillgängliga men jag vill ta tag i detta så snart som möjligt, i alla fall senast i början på nästa vecka.

Här kommer en lista på enheter som jag tror detta har hänt på tidigare:

Select * from
(
SELECT
SheetId,
Info,
ManufacturerSlot,
ManufacturerStation,
Source,
(Select MAX(ArchiveStatus) from alcimdb.dbo.Maps_Tickets where SheetId = Stock_StockSheets.SheetId) AS Archived
F…
```

</details>

### [AW-221951] — 8912 prod. sequence wrong

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Ticket ID** | `[AW-221951]` |
| **Status** | 🔵 In Progress |
| **Category** | Support Clarity / Support Sweden |
| **Last Action** | 16.06.2025 08:18 |

**Description:**

> RE: [AW-221951] 8912 prod. sequence wrong (6) Hello, To explain in more detail: Usually, the files go in sequence 89120240, 89120241, 89120242, 89120243 and 89120244. In these files the production sequence should be from 1 to 58 (58 units in batch total). However, if you check 1st file 89120240 contains items from 31 to 44 2nd file 89120241 contains item 1 and then items 45 to 58 3rd file 89120242 contains items 2 to 15 4th file 89120243 contains items 16 to 29 5th file 89120244 contains item 30...

<details>
<summary>View Full Conversation Thread</summary>

```
From: Linas Vaiciunas (linas@glasslt.com)
To: regimantas@glasslt.com, support.se@a-w.com | Date: 16.06.2025 08:18
Type: Request | 
RE: [AW-221951] 8912 prod. sequence wrong (6)
Hello,

To explain in more detail:

Usually, the files go in sequence 89120240, 89120241, 89120242, 89120243 and 89120244.
In these files the production sequence should be from 1 to 58 (58 units in batch total).
However, if you check
1st file 89120240 contains items from 31 to 44
2nd file 89120241 contains item 1 and then items 45 to 58
3rd file 89120242 contains items 2 to 15
4th file 89120243 contains items 16 to 29
5th file 89120244 contains item 30

And expected is:
1st file items 1 to 14
2nd file items 15 to 28
3rd file items 29 to 42
4th file items 43 to 57
5th file items 58

Or something similar, based on the rule that there can be max 42 sheets in a single TRF file and of course based on the PMO.

Best regards

Linas Vaičiūnas
Process engineer
[signature_540931018]+370 688 34696

From: Regimantas Graževičius <regimantas@glasslt.com>
Sent: Friday, June 6, 2025 4:55 PM
To: Support Mailbox Sweden <support.se@a-w.com>
Cc: Linas Vaičiūnas <linas@glass…
```

</details>

[AW-233116] (3) Hej Ola, Beskrivning av formatet osv. är det tyvärr sämre med, jag pratade med en kollega tittat lite närmare på detta för något år sedan som konstaterat att denna integration skapades för en kund för 20 – 25 år sedan och min kollega var inte medveten om någon kund som idag använder denna funktion. Det ser alltså ut som att det inte är ett bra alternativ att försöka använda denna gamla funktion för import av pris. Hur ser priserna ut som ni jobbar med här,...

From: Henrik Johansson (Henrik.Johansson@a-w.com)
To: Ola.Anvegard@glasgruppen.se | Date: 13.06.2025 16:32
Type: Request | 
RE: Prishöjning per kg. [AW-233116] (3)
Hej Ola,
 
Beskrivning av formatet osv. är det tyvärr sämre med, jag pratade med en kollega tittat lite närmare på detta för något år sedan som konstaterat att denna integration skapades för en kund för 20 – 25 år sedan och min kollega var inte medveten om någon kund som idag använder denna funktion. Det ser alltså ut som att det inte är ett bra alternativ att försöka använda denna gamla funktion för import av pris.
 
Hur ser priserna ut som ni jobbar med här, är det enkelpriser eller är det mycket matris / vektor priser? Jag fick lite info om att vi har en kund där vi skapat en lösning där vi kan läsa en csv fil i databasen med hjälp av en customizing för att underlätta stora uppdateringar av priser men då är det enkelpris som används då dessa inte är like komplexa att hantera på detta sätt.
 
Jag har pratat lite med Anders om andra möjlig lösningar utöver utvecklingsförslag via R&D, vi ska diskutera det vidare i början på nästa vecka och jag återkopplar när jag har lite mer in…
```

</details>

Filialer och hantering av hierarkier på internorder och inköpsorder av frakter (2)
Hej,

Vi har som ni vet avvecklat vår produktion och bolaget RB Glas & Plast AB men har fortsatt jobbat med leveranser ned dit både till en avhämtasyta och även direkt till kunder.
Frakterna utgår från Örebro och har skickats med extern transportör och hanterats manuellt med papper och packning samt ordning sker genom sortering av papper i pärm.

Vi har i Örebro Smart delivery sedan tidigare och har nu uppgraderat till OTR - Logistic optimizer och har frågor om det finns något sätt och hur man smidigast får med informationen på internköp in i AWP/AWB samt OTR.

Vår ruttlista för planering av körningen kan se ut enligt nedan bild där KJ lägger en hel del order i produktion på MGA med AB Klaes Jansson som kund men avvikande leveransadress och ska köras till antingen avhämtasytan (GG GBG) eller till kund direkt beroende på prefixet i leveransadress samt adressen som ni kan se där GG GBG läggs till manuellt före kundnamnet i respektive order och får adress Järnmalmsgatan 7 medan de…
```

Sometimes the showing in Business looks wrong but it gets correct in the end (1)
• Distansprofiler vid stepp
Det är visningen som blir fel när de ändrar step så hänger inte distanser med i vyn utan det ser fel ut men det blir rätt
Behöver kolla detta i mitt system och prova hut det blir där eftersom det är nyare.
 
 • Lackat med urtag eller hål
Lacken läggs över urtaget och då ser det lite konstigt ut
Testa i mitt VM för att se om det blir bättre eftersom jag har ett nyare system
Vid former är lacken rektangulär
Visad av kunden under rundturen om att formen bara läggs som en fyrkant när  man lägger in den på exempeklvis rund
Testa i mitt VM för att se om det blir bättre eftersom jag har ett nyare system

### [AW-218692] — PO for stock article (with size) gets booked to 0x0 stock when goods reciept is done

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Ticket ID** | `[AW-218692]` |
| **Status** | ⚪ Unknown |

| **Last Action** | 28.05.2025 12:12 |

<details>
<summary>View Full Conversation Thread</summary>

```
From: Jens Thorsen
To: Henrik Johansson | Date: 28.05.2025 12:12
Type: State changed | 
PO for stock article (with size) gets booked to 0x0 stock when goods reciept is done (6)
I have tested this scenario in Osbys testsystem as bellow.  Waiting for feedback from the customer if they have tested everything
Jag har testat enligt lista nedan.
 • Jag har användt artikel 56912 i mitt test för att valiodera lösningen som vi fick av utvecklaren.
 • För att vara säker så inte jag valde fel lager artikel så tog jag bort den som hade lager måtten 1x1000. Kvarvarande lagerartiklar är 0x0 och 0x1000
 • Jag skapade en inköpsorder på artikel 56912 och leverantör 1036 med en beställning på 500 st
 • Jag valde lagerartikel med måtten 0 x 1000
 • Jag gjorde en fullständig gods mottagning på samtliga till lagerplats Osby-Ny produkt-<tom>-<tom>
 • Lager uppdaterades med 500 för artikel 56912
 • Email till Ola med beskrivning på vad och hur jag har testat.
```

</details>

**Description:**

> Genomsnittspris på lager (2) Hej, Jag vet att jag frågat förr men tycker mig inte se något tydligt mönster i hur genomsnittspriset på lagret beräknas. Har kollat i hjälpdelen avseende beräkningen enligt nedan, men får det inte att hänga som ni kan se i exemplet bifogat. Därför undrar jag om ni kan se om det finns någon parameter i beräkningen kring tidsperiod eller något som tas med i beräkningen? I mina ögon bör det vara FIFO-metoden där äldsta inköpen "tas" ut från lager först även om det inte...

<details>
<summary>View Full Conversation Thread</summary>

```
From: Martin Green (martin.green@glasgruppen.se)
To: support.se@a-w.com | Date: 27.05.2025 10:51
Type: Request | 
Genomsnittspris på lager (2)
Hej,

Jag vet att jag frågat förr men tycker mig inte se något tydligt mönster i hur genomsnittspriset på lagret beräknas.

Har kollat i hjälpdelen avseende beräkningen enligt nedan, men får det inte att hänga som ni kan se i exemplet bifogat. Därför undrar jag om ni kan se om det finns någon parameter i beräkningen kring tidsperiod eller något som tas med i beräkningen? I mina ögon bör det vara FIFO-metoden där äldsta inköpen "tas" ut från lager först även om det inte är verkligheten kanske innan den beräknar genomsnittspriset.

Vi får varje år stickprov på detta från revisorerna men det föreligger alltid differenser som jag har svårt att förklara för att jag inte vet hur systemet räknar.

Med vänlig hälsning,
Martin

Just to confirm that I have understood your request correctly I'd like to to clarify a few things. If I have understood this correctly then the only way to do this would be wi...

<details>
<summary>View Full Conversation Thread</summary>

```
From: Henrik Johansson (support.se@a-w.com)
To: jrl@glaseksperten.dk | Date: 04.03.2025 09:42
Type: Answer | 
RE: [AW-216125] Fragt på ordre (4)
Hi Joachim,
Sorry about the delayed answer regarding this ticket. Just to confirm that I have understood your request correctly I'd like to to clarify a few things.
My understanding is that you would like is to disable the delivery fee surcharge (Fragt) on the order header, so it's not added automatically to position 907 if the other "manual" delivery fee article is added to the order?
If I have understood this correctly then the only way to do this would be with a custom function (customizing formula) that we run on price calculation, then we check if the article for "manual shipping fee" is added to any position on the order and if it is, then we disable the delivery fee surcharge on the order header. A few points to highlight if a custom function for this is of interest to you:
 • Keep in mind that if there are other documents with the same delivery date for this customer, these would not be affected by this.
 • If the manual delivery fee is removed again from the order, we …
```

</details>

Skulle vilja att man aktivt måste kryssa i den varje gång om man vill ha med det eller inte.

Sen återstår problemet med varför det inte fungerade med att lägga till glasen i bräckagepoolen och att Galactic skar glasen så de kommer in i sorteringen på rätt väg?

//Robin

Best regards Erik Berggren ###EOM## A+W Support Sweden +46 (0) 35 175 417 A+W Support UK + 44 (0) 560348 8606 A+W Support Poland +48 61 436 63 74 A+W Helpdesk Tool and other ways of contacts https://www.a-w.com/u...

Hello Marcus,
It automatically updates the ERP system (A+W Business) when you press the "Finish" flag on the route, which is required to close it. The "Send to ERP" button is only needed if changes are made after finishing.

RE: [AW-235990] List of Registered Scanners (13)
Instructions for resetting their Android devices if they are unable to figure it out. 

 
To factory reset (wipe and reload) an Android device, you'll typically go into Settings, find the Reset or System section, and choose "Erase all data (factory reset)". This process will remove all user data and settings, returning the device to its original state as if it were new. It's crucial to back up your data before initiating a factory reset, as it is irreversible and will erase everything. 
Detailed Steps:
 • 1. Backup your data:
Before starting, make sure to back up any important data like photos, videos, contacts, and documents to a cloud service (like Google Drive or Samsung Cloud) or your computer. 

 • 2. Open Settings:
Locate and open the Settings app on your Android device. The icon usually looks like a gear. 

 • 3. Navigate to System (or similar):
Look for a section related to System or System & updates. This might also be labeled as General Management on some devi…
```

</details>

Hi Mark,
 
I wanted to provide a quick update on your project status.
 
We are currently waiting on a new driver from Intermac in order to move forward with the final setup and testing of the Vertimax integration. Unfortunately, this has caused some delays on our end, as we’ve been unable to complete the necessary steps without their support.
 
Please rest assured that as soon as we receive the updated driver, we will resume work immediately to finalize your project. We understand how important it is to get this completed, and we appreciate your patience while we work through this dependency.
 
I’ll continue to keep you informed as we hear more from Intermac. In the meantime, don’t hesitate to reach out if you have any questions.
 
Best regards,

Jennifer Armatis
A+W Software

Hi Chris,

I believe I found the cause of the issue. I can see that at the bottom edge there is a

The proper processing code.

I will have R&D look into how to send those over properly. But any "regular" order
should just work fine.

From: Dirk Langsdorf
To: Eike Luh | Date: 04.06.2025 11:53
Type: State changed | 
RE: [AW-224865] MNPLS: Avalara certification needs (13)
Hello Derya and Eike,
 
I have created the hotfixes for Minneapolis Glass about Avalara Certification and commit of credit notes
In this version the type for creating the call to Alvalara for credit notes is changed to “returnorder” and “returninvoice” if committed.
For quotes and orders it’s working as it was.
 
The sandbox mode is now a switch in the company data and so I have got ride of the last parameter on the udf_AvalaraTax() function.
This was the sandbox option, which is moved to company date.
This means you MUST change the formular which is calculating the tax in document entry. Delete the last parameter !!!!
 
The Hotfix MUST installed with the Setup Launcher because the ComercialCOMProxy has changed his interface.
At least a ..Config/RegisterCOM.exe must be called.
 
I think you should have QR2503 as a base for this hotfix. On older versions I can’t guarantee that it’s working, this depends on Zero Hotfixes which must be applied.
 
\\jupiter\SW_INSTALL\Hotfi…
```

</details>

AlcimJobRelease.dll v 13.6.19979

Configuration:
Configuration with xl_JobRelease.CFG
[XL_ISO_FOREL_IG_x]
;Consideration of line direction: 1: left to right, 2: right to left
DirectionOfLine=1
WriteShapeBaseEdge=Y
SteppingMode=2

Shape99AsRectangle=Y
LamiWithoutThickness=Y
SpacerTextMode=1

> RE: [AW-222796] Breakage  Reason List (6) Hello Marco, Ahmed from our extended team provided you below information. We are not advising to delete the records from this dialog not to cause any import issue but disabling will be better option. If you can send us the list of the records that you want to disable; we can help you to disable it since it is a query that we need to run on. Breakage Pool List shared by the client is from Master Data -> Barcoding -> Statuses It shows all the different sta...

<details>
<summary>View Full Conversation Thread</summary>

```
From: Derya Aydemir (support.us@a-w.com)
To: marco@premiumwindows.com | Date: 07.03.2025 23:39
Type: Answer | 
RE: [AW-222796] Breakage  Reason List (6)
Hello Marco,
Ahmed from our extended team provided you below information. We are not advising to delete the records from this dialog not to cause any import issue but disabling will be better option. If you can send us the list of the records that you want to disable; we can help you to disable it since it is a query that we need to run on.
Breakage Pool List shared by the client is from Master Data -> Barcoding -> Statuses
It shows all the different states that can be defined for the lites/glass as well as the machines. 

In my VM I have added a Test Breakage status (997) as an example.

The data for Statuses is stored in the awbar_zustand table.

In the awbar_zustand table we have a field aktiv_flag.
If aktiv_flag is set to 1 then the status is inactive and should not be displayed in the statuses list.

So in my example I have updated the aktiv_flag to 1 for my Test Breakage Status (997) and checked in the Master Data -> Barcoding -> Statuses list again.

Thank you,
D…
```

</details>

Hello Jennifer,
As mentioned, we just did an update recently.
Unless you can guarantee that this update will fix the outstanding problem with the batch release, I don’t want to proceed with another update this year.
 
We must test these updates in our test environment first to ensure they don’t cause problems. As you saw with the recent update for SS2, they could easily blow up our system, so I want to be very cautious about taking them.
 
Also, we need to be trained to install these updates ourselve…

> Re: [AW-219173] Ticket confirmation / OTMG: Pattern glass 3/8 Rain (9) Jennifer As stated in my email 2/7, 11:28am.  It is not possible to optimize the batch because the production manager does have enough stock sheets of the 1/4" AE. When it clearly shows 3 sheets in the production manager, and in the inventory module (stock on hand) it shows 9. This is my effort to fully test all of the pattern glass.  Until I am able to have the inventory issue corrected I can not proceed. Chris _____________...

```
From: Chris Gould (chrisg@otmglass.com)
To: Jennifer.Armatis@a-w.com, Eike.Luh@a-w.com, kenny@smartglazier.com, Loren.Powell@a-w.com | Date: 10.02.2025 14:52
Type: Request | 
Re: [AW-219173] Ticket confirmation / OTMG: Pattern glass 3/8 Rain (9)
Jennifer
As stated in my email 2/7, 11:28am.  It is not possible to optimize the batch because the production manager does have enough stock sheets of the 1/4" AE.
When it clearly shows 3 sheets in the production manager, and in the inventory module (stock on hand) it shows 9.
This is my effort to fully test all of the pattern glass.  Until I am able to have the inventory issue corrected I can not proceed.

Chris

ich wünsche Ihnen ein schönen Urlaub.
Sie hatten die Frage gestellt, ob ihr System Barrierefrei ist. Um diesen Status zu erreichen ist durchaus einiges an dieser Seite zu tun.
Grundsätzlich müssen folgende Dinge zu treffen, damit  Als erstes ist es nur Verpflichtend für:
- Unternehmen, die digitale Produkte und Dienstleistungen für Endnutzer anbieten, z. B.:

Hallo!
Deine Website unter https://glasgruppe.de wurde automatisch auf WordPress 6.8.2 aktualisiert.
Es sind keine weiteren Aktionen deinerseits notwendig. Um mehr über Version 6.8.2 zu erfahren, schau dir die Seite „Über WordPress“ an:
https://glasgruppe.de/wp-admin/about.php
Wenn du irgendwelche Fehler feststellst oder Unterstützung benötigst, steht dir das WordPress.org-Support-Forum mit seinen freiwilligen Helfern zur Verfügung.
https://de.wordpress.org/support/
Es stehen auch Aktualisierungen für einige deiner Plugins oder Themes zur Verfügung. Aktualisiere sie jetzt:
https://glasgruppe.de/wp-admin/
Das WordPress-Team

 
Glasgruppe

> Implementierung der Onlevel Konfiguratoren auf unserer Gruppenwebseite (2) Hallo Herr Zaumseil, Onlevel hat ein Framework mit verschiedenen Konfiguratoren entwickelt, das wir gerne in unsere Webseite http://www.glasgruppe.de integrieren möchten. Dieses Framework-Tool soll zunächst für unseren Standort Mayer Lehn eingerichtet werden. Wenn die Implementierung erfolgreich ist, soll auch Mayer Ludwigshafen einen eigenen Konfigurator erhalten. From: Mehmet Eralp (m.eralp@mayerlehn.de)
To: support.online-systems@a-w.com | Date: 06.05.2025 14:46
Type: Request | 
Implementierung der Onlevel Konfiguratoren auf unserer Gruppenwebseite (2)
Hallo Herr Zaumseil,

Onlevel hat ein Framework mit verschiedenen Konfiguratoren entwickelt, das wir gerne in unsere Webseite http://www.glasgruppe.de integrieren möchten.

Dieses Framework-Tool soll zunächst für unseren Standort Mayer Lehn eingerichtet werden. Wenn die Implementierung erfolgreich ist, soll auch Mayer Ludwigshafen einen eigenen Konfigurator erhalten.

Sobald Onlevel das Framework fertiggestellt hat, werden wir Ihnen den notwendigen Code zur Einbindung zukommen lassen.

Wir stellen uns die Einbindung in die Hauptnavigation unter der Kategorie "Konfiguratoren" als Unterpunkt "MAYER LEHN - Onlevel" (alternativ "Glas Mayer - Onlevel") vor.

Wir sind aber offen für Ihre besseren Vorschläge zur optimalen Platzierung.

Mit freundlichen Grüßen  

MAYER LEHN GmbH & Co. KG
Glas & Bauelemente 

Mehmet Eralp
   
E-Mail: m.eralp@mayerlehn.de
Tel: +49 6144 934341
Fax: +49 6144 9343834

Web: https://glasgruppe.de/ginsheim  

SOCIAL-MEDIA - Folgen Sie uns doc…
```

</details>
